description: BP Batam: KPI Card — ringkasan seluruh permohonan (total, terbit, tolak, proses, overdue)
sql_template:
SELECT 
    COUNT(NO_PERMOHONAN) AS TOTAL_DOKUMEN,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TERBIT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TOTAL_TERBIT,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TOLAK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TOTAL_TOLAK,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'DALAM PROSES' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TOTAL_DALAM_PROSES,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS IN ('PROSES PELAKU USAHA', 'CABUT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TOTAL_LAINNYA,
    COALESCE(SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) != 'LALIN' AND KATEGORI_STATUS = 'DALAM PROSES' AND STATUS_PENCAPAIAN_SLA = 'LEWAT SLA' THEN 1 
            WHEN UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) = 'LALIN' AND KATEGORI_STATUS = 'DALAM PROSES' AND (
                SYSDATE - 
                CASE 
                    WHEN (CAST(TGL_BAYAR_LALIN AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TGL_BAYAR_LALIN AS DATE))) > (16.5 / 24) 
                         THEN TRUNC(CAST(TGL_BAYAR_LALIN AS DATE)) + 1 + (8 / 24)
                    WHEN (CAST(TGL_BAYAR_LALIN AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TGL_BAYAR_LALIN AS DATE))) < (8 / 24) 
                         THEN TRUNC(CAST(TGL_BAYAR_LALIN AS DATE)) + (8 / 24)
                    ELSE CAST(TGL_BAYAR_LALIN AS DATE)
                END
            ) * 24 > 24 THEN 1
            ELSE 0 
        END
    ), 0) AS TOTAL_OVERDUE
FROM US_DWH.BI_T_ALL
WHERE 1=1
  AND {tgl_status_terakhir}
  AND {perizinan}
  AND {kategori_status}
  AND {tahun}
  AND {bulan}

insight_template.insight: Distribusi [TOTAL_DOKUMEN] permohonan menunjukkan komposisi yang dinamis antara output final ([TOTAL_TERBIT] terbit) dan sisa antrean operasional ([TOTAL_DALAM_PROSES] dalam proses). [TOTAL_OVERDUE] sebagai indikator bottleneck kritis memberikan sinyal peringatan dini; jika proporsi overdue ini meningkat terhadap total dokumen, hal ini menandakan adanya structural lag atau hambatan pada tahap verifikasi teknis yang tidak mampu mengimbangi volume masuk. Sinergi antara logika overdue standar dan real-time khusus untuk izin Lalin memastikan pelacakan SLA yang presisi di seluruh lini perizinan.
insight_template.rekomendasi: Gunakan panel Scorecard ini sebagai instrumen navigasi taktis harian untuk mengalokasikan sumber daya secara agile. Segera lakukan deep-dive pada data permohonan yang berkontribusi pada [TOTAL_OVERDUE] untuk membedah akar penyebab keterlambatan—apakah karena kerumitan dokumen spesifik atau beban kerja verifikator yang tidak merata. Rekomendasi strategisnya adalah mengaktifkan dashboard alert khusus untuk setiap penambahan kasus overdue, agar manajemen dapat melakukan redistribusi tugas sebelum hambatan tersebut berdampak pada penurunan reputasi kepatuhan layanan secara instansi.

insight_patterns: Total {total_dokumen} dokumen dengan {total_terbit} terbit, {total_tolak} ditolak, {total_dalam_proses} dalam proses, dan {total_overdue} overdue.
bullet_patterns: Saran: filter per jenis izin atau periode untuk analisis lebih lanjut.

description: BP Batam: Alur/Sankey permohonan izin — total ke jenis izin ke status
sql_template:
WITH FILTERED_DATA AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN JENIS_IZIN = 'LALIN' THEN KATEGORI_IZIN_LALIN
            ELSE JENIS_IZIN
        END AS KATEGORI_IZIN,
        CASE
            WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS IN ('PROSES PELAKU USAHA', 'CABUT') THEN 'PROSES LAIN'
            ELSE KATEGORI_STATUS
        END AS TARGET_STATUS,
        NO_PERMOHONAN
    FROM US_DWH.BI_T_ALL
    WHERE 1=1
      AND {pilih_izin}
      AND {filter_tahun}
      AND {filter_bulan}
      AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
),
AGGREGATED_DATA AS (
    SELECT 
        KATEGORI_IZIN, TARGET_STATUS, COUNT(NO_PERMOHONAN) AS JUMLAH
    FROM FILTERED_DATA
    GROUP BY KATEGORI_IZIN, TARGET_STATUS
),
FINAL_FLOW AS (
    SELECT 
        'TOTAL PERMOHONAN' AS SOURCE, 
        KATEGORI_IZIN AS TARGET, 
        COALESCE(SUM(JUMLAH), 0) AS VALUE,
        1 AS FLOW_LEVEL
    FROM AGGREGATED_DATA 
    GROUP BY KATEGORI_IZIN
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        KATEGORI_IZIN AS SOURCE, 
        TARGET_STATUS AS TARGET, 
        COALESCE(JUMLAH, 0) AS VALUE,
        2 AS FLOW_LEVEL
    FROM AGGREGATED_DATA 
    WHERE JUMLAH > 0
)
SELECT SOURCE, TARGET, VALUE 
FROM FINAL_FLOW
ORDER BY FLOW_LEVEL ASC, VALUE DESC

params.pilih_izin: Filter jenis izin (contoh: (UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) = UPPER('PB') OR UPPER(KATEGORI_IZIN_LALIN) = UPPER('PB')))
params.rentang_tgl_masuk: Filter rentang tanggal masuk (contoh: TGL_MASUK >= TO_DATE('2025-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD'))

examples: Alur total permohonan per jenis izin dan status

insight_template.insight: Dari [TOTAL] dokumen berstatus belum tuntas, terlihat distribusi yang menyebar ke berbagai proses internal—mulai dari verifikasi staf, koreksi pelaku usaha, hingga menunggu rapat dan persetujuan pimpinan. Komposisi ini menggambarkan pipeline aktif yang membutuhkan monitoring ketat agar tidak terjadi penumpukan di titik-titik yang memiliki kapasitas pemrosesan terbatas, sehingga berpotensi memunculkan bottleneck baru yang menghambat percepatan penyelesaian.
insight_template.rekomendasi: Sebaiknya dilakukan analisis detail pada aliran yang memiliki volume besar untuk memastikan kapasitas sumber daya manusia dan sistem memadai. Data ini juga dapat dimanfaatkan untuk melakukan simulasi skenario before-after jika diterapkan kebijakan baru, misalnya prioritas penyelesaian berdasarkan usia dokumen atau jenis permohonan tertentu. Penggunaan diagram ini secara berkala akan membantu pimpinan dalam mengambil keputusan berbasis data untuk perbaikan SOP dan alokasi tenaga verifikator secara lebih presisi.

Selisih yang terjadi antara inflow dan outflow menunjukkan adanya [GAP] dokumen yang belum terselesaikan, yang jika terus terakumulasi berpotensi meningkatkan beban kerja dan waktu tunggu penyelesaian.

Apabila terjadi tren penurunan, segera evaluasi SOP dan alokasi sumber daya pada jenis izin yang bermasalah agar performa keseluruhan tetap terjaga.

description: BP Batam: Kepatuhan SLA permohonan izin
sql_template:
SELECT 
    COALESCE(
        ROUND(
            SUM(
                CASE 
                    WHEN STATUS_PENCAPAIAN_SLA = 'SESUAI SLA' OR KATEGORI_STATUS IN ('PROSES PELAKU USAHA', 'CABUT') THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END
            ) 
            / NULLIF(COUNT(NO_PERMOHONAN), 0), 
        4), 
    0) AS KEPATUHAN_SLA
FROM US_DWH.BI_T_ALL
WHERE 1=1
  AND {pilih_izin}
  AND {filter_tahun}
  AND {filter_bulan}
  AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}

params.pilih_izin: Filter jenis izin (contoh: (UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) = UPPER('PB') OR UPPER(KATEGORI_IZIN_LALIN) = UPPER('PB')))
params.rentang_tgl_masuk: Filter rentang tanggal masuk (contoh: TGL_MASUK >= TO_DATE('2025-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD'))

insight_template.insight: Capaian [KEPATUHAN_SLA] pada Gauge Chart ini menggambarkan tingkat kepatuhan layanan terhadap Service Level Agreement yang telah ditetapkan. Angka ini memberikan indikasi awal mengenai kualitas layanan—apakah mayoritas permohonan diselesaikan tepat waktu atau justru mengalami keterlambatan yang dapat mempengaruhi tingkat kepuasan pengguna layanan dan reputasi instansi.
insight_template.rekomendasi: Segera identifikasi permohonan yang tidak memenuhi SLA, terutama yang memiliki nilai overdue tertinggi, untuk ditindaklanjuti secara prioritas. Lakukan analisis penyebab utama ketidakpatuhan SLA—apakah karena lonjakan volume, keterbatasan SDM, atau kerumitan teknis dokumen—sebagai dasar perbaikan berkelanjutan terhadap target SLA di masa mendatang.

bullet_patterns: Saran: identifikasi faktor penyebab ketidakpatuhan SLA.

description: BP Batam: Analisis kemacetan/funnel permohonan per tahapan proses
sql_template:
WITH DATA_STATUS AS (
    SELECT 
        UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) AS JENIS_IZIN, 
        UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) AS STATUS_TERAKHIR,
        UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) AS KATEGORI_STATUS
    FROM US_DWH.BI_T_ALL
    WHERE 1=1
      AND {pilih_izin}
      AND {filter_tahun}
      AND {filter_bulan}
      AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
),
MODE_FUNNEL AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT JENIS_IZIN) = 1 AND MAX(JENIS_IZIN) IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PKKPRL', 'PPKH', 'LALIN') THEN MAX(JENIS_IZIN) 
            ELSE 'UMUM' 
        END AS TIPE_FUNNEL
    FROM DATA_STATUS
),
LEVELING AS (
    SELECT D.*, M.TIPE_FUNNEL,
        CASE 
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL = 'UMUM' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TERBIT%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%DISETUJUI%' OR KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TERBIT' THEN 4
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%KEMBALI%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%PEMBAYARAN%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%PERBAIKAN%' OR KATEGORI_STATUS = 'PROSES PELAKU USAHA' THEN 3
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%VERIFIKASI%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%RAPAT%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%STAF%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%KASIE%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%DIREKTUR%' OR KATEGORI_STATUS = 'DALAM PROSES' THEN 2
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%PENOLAKAN%' OR KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TOLAK' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU') THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TERBIT%' THEN 6
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%VERIFIKASI%' THEN 5
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%SURVEI%' THEN 4
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%PERSETUJUAN%' THEN 3
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%KOMITMEN%' THEN 2
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%KEMBALI%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TOLAK' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL = 'PL' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TERBIT%' THEN 4
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%RAPAT%' THEN 3
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TEKNIS%' THEN 2
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TOLAK' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL = 'PKKPRL' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TERBIT%' THEN 7
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%PERSETUJUAN%' THEN 6
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%RAPAT%' THEN 5
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%VERIFIKASI TEKNIS%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TEKNIS%' THEN 4
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%VERIFIKASI DOKUMEN%' THEN 3
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%SPP%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%BAYAR%' THEN 2
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%PENOLAKAN%' OR KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TOLAK' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL = 'PPKH' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TERBIT%' THEN 5
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%DIREKTUR%' THEN 4
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%KASIE%' THEN 3
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%STAF%' THEN 2
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%PENOLAKAN%' OR KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TOLAK' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL = 'LALIN' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TERBIT%' OR KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TERBIT' THEN 7
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%PTSP%' THEN 6
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%LALU LINTAS%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%LALIN%' THEN 5
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%KASUBDIT%' THEN 4
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%KASI%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%KEPALA SEKSI%' THEN 3
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%STAF%' OR STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%VERIFIKATOR%' THEN 2
                    WHEN STATUS_TERAKHIR LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TOLAK' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
        END AS LVL
    FROM DATA_STATUS D
    CROSS JOIN MODE_FUNNEL M
),
CUMULATIVE AS (
    SELECT 1 AS LVL_ID, COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH FROM LEVELING UNION ALL
    SELECT 2, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 2 UNION ALL
    SELECT 3, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 3 UNION ALL
    SELECT 4, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 4 UNION ALL
    SELECT 5, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 5 UNION ALL
    SELECT 6, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 6 UNION ALL
    SELECT 7, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 7
),
LABELS AS (
    SELECT 'UMUM' AS TIPE, 1 AS LVL_ID, '1. Permohonan Masuk' AS LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'UMUM', 2, '2. Dalam Proses' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'UMUM', 3, '3. Proses Pelaku Usaha' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'UMUM', 4, '4. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 1, '1. Permohonan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 2, '2. Pemenuhan Komitmen' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 3, '3. Persetujuan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 4, '4. Survei' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 5, '5. Verifikasi' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 6, '6. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 1, '1. Permohonan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 2, '2. Pemenuhan Komitmen' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 3, '3. Persetujuan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 4, '4. Survei' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 5, '5. Verifikasi' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 6, '6. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PL', 1, '1. Permohonan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PL', 2, '2. Verifikasi Teknis' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PL', 3, '3. Rapat Pimpinan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PL', 4, '4. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 1, '1. Permohonan Masuk' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 2, '2. Pelunasan SPP' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 3, '3. Verifikasi Dokumen' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 4, '4. Verifikasi Teknis' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 5, '5. Rapat Pimpinan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 6, '6. Persetujuan KKPRL' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 7, '7. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PPKH', 1, '1. Permohonan Masuk' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PPKH', 2, '2. Staf Pemroses' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PPKH', 3, '3. Kasie Pemroses' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PPKH', 4, '4. Direktur PPKH' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PPKH', 5, '5. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'LALIN', 1, '1. Dokumen Masuk' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'LALIN', 2, '2. Staf / Verifikator' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'LALIN', 3, '3. Kepala Seksi' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'LALIN', 4, '4. Kasubdit Perizinan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'LALIN', 5, '5. Direktur Lalu Lintas Barang' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'LALIN', 6, '6. Direktur PTSP' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'LALIN', 7, '7. Izin Terbit' FROM DUAL
)
SELECT 
    L.LABEL AS TAHAPAN_PROSES, 
    COALESCE(C.JUMLAH, 0) AS JUMLAH_DOKUMEN 
FROM CUMULATIVE C
CROSS JOIN MODE_FUNNEL M
JOIN LABELS L ON C.LVL_ID = L.LVL_ID AND L.TIPE = M.TIPE_FUNNEL
WHERE L.LABEL IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY L.LVL_ID

params.rentang_tgl_masuk: Filter rentang tanggal masuk (contoh: TGL_MASUK >= TO_DATE('2025-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD'))

insight_template.insight: Funnel ini memetakan transisi [JUMLAH_TOTAL] dokumen yang mengalir dari satu tahapan ke tahapan berikutnya, sehingga terlihat jelas di titik mana terjadi penyempitan atau kemacetan proses. Tahap yang memiliki penurunan jumlah drastis menandakan hambatan serius yang perlu segera diidentifikasi penyebabnya—apakah karena kompleksitas verifikasi, keterbatasan SDM, atau faktor eksternal seperti kelengkapan dokumen dari pemohon.
insight_template.rekomendasi: Lakukan intervensi langsung pada bottleneck utama, misalnya dengan menambah tenaga verifikator di tahap yang paling lambat atau mengoptimalkan sistem antrian digital. Pertimbangkan pula penerapan auto-routing untuk dokumen yang memerlukan verifikasi berulang, sehingga beban kerja staf dapat dikurangi dan waktu siklus penyelesaian dapat dipangkas secara signifikan.

bullet_patterns: Saran: fokus pada tahap dengan penurunan tertinggi.

description: BP Batam: Proporsi kerja staf (dalam vs di luar jam kerja)
sql_template:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) NOT IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PPKH', 'PKKPRL') THEN 
            CASE 
                WHEN TO_CHAR(TGL_MASUK, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') NOT IN ('SAT', 'SUN') 
                AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(TGL_MASUK, 'HH24MI')) BETWEEN 800 AND 1630 
                THEN 'Dalam Jam Kerja' 
                ELSE 'Di Luar Jam Kerja' 
            END
        ELSE 
            CASE 
                WHEN TO_CHAR(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'HH24') = '00' THEN 'Dalam Jam Kerja'
                WHEN TO_CHAR(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'HH24MI') BETWEEN 800 AND 1630 THEN 'Dalam Jam Kerja'
                ELSE 'Di Luar Jam Kerja'
            END
    END AS KATEGORI_WAKTU,
    COUNT(NO_PERMOHONAN) AS JUMLAH_DOKUMEN
FROM US_DWH.BI_T_ALL
WHERE 1=1
  AND (
      (UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PPKH', 'PKKPRL') AND VERIFIKATOR IS NOT NULL)
      OR 
      (UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) NOT IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PPKH', 'PKKPRL'))
  )
  AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
  AND {pilih_izin}
  AND {filter_tahun}
  AND {filter_bulan}
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) NOT IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PPKH', 'PKKPRL') THEN 
            CASE 
                WHEN TO_CHAR(TGL_MASUK, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') NOT IN ('SAT', 'SUN') 
                AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(TGL_MASUK, 'HH24MI')) BETWEEN 800 AND 1630 
                THEN 'Dalam Jam Kerja' 
                ELSE 'Di Luar Jam Kerja' 
            END
        ELSE 
            CASE 
                WHEN TO_CHAR(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'HH24') = '00' THEN 'Dalam Jam Kerja'
                WHEN TO_CHAR(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'HH24MI') BETWEEN 800 AND 1630 THEN 'Dalam Jam Kerja'
                ELSE 'Di Luar Jam Kerja'
            END
    END

params.rentang_tgl_masuk: Filter rentang tanggal masuk (contoh: TGL_MASUK >= TO_DATE('2025-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD'))

llm_label: Proporsi kerja staf dalam vs luar jam kerja

insight_template.judul: Proporsi Kerja Staf Dalam/Luar Jam Kerja
insight_template.insight: Proporsi [KATEGORI_DALAM] dan [KATEGORI_LUAR] mencerminkan beban dan pola kerja staf dalam menangani permohonan izin. [PERSEN_DALAM]% pekerjaan dilakukan dalam jam kerja formal ([KATEGORI_DALAM]), sementara [PERSEN_LUAR]% dilakukan di luar jam kerja ([KATEGORI_LUAR]). Tingginya aktivitas di luar jam kerja dapat mengindikasikan ketidakseimbangan antara kapasitas SDM dengan volume pekerjaan yang harus diselesaikan.
insight_template.rekomendasi: Evaluasi kembali distribusi beban kerja dan pertimbangkan penyesuaian jam kerja fleksibel atau penambahan SDM jika proporsi luar jam kerja terus meningkat. Selain itu, berikan apresiasi atau insentif bagi staf yang menunjukkan dedikasi tinggi, namun pastikan hal ini tidak menjadi pola permanen yang berisiko menurunkan kesejahteraan dan produktivitas jangka panjang.

description: BP Batam: Rapor evaluasi staf (skor akhir, performa, produktivitas, SLA)
sql_template:
WITH STATS_PB AS (
    SELECT 
        UPPER(TRIM(VERIFIKATOR)) AS NAMA_STAF,
        COUNT(NO_PERMOHONAN) AS TOTAL_KERJA,
        SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(KATEGORI_STATUS) NOT IN ('DALAM PROSES', 'PROSES') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_LOLOS,
        SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'HH24') = '00' 
               OR TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'HH24MI')) BETWEEN 800 AND 1630 
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA,
        SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(STATUS_PENCAPAIAN_SLA) IN ('SESUAI SLA', 'MEMENUHI SLA') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA
    FROM US_DWH.BI_T_ALL
    WHERE VERIFIKATOR IS NOT NULL
      AND UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PPKH', 'PKKPRL')
      AND (UPPER(JABATAN_VERIFIKATOR) LIKE '%VERIFIKATOR%' OR UPPER(JABATAN_VERIFIKATOR) LIKE '%STAF%')
      AND {pilih_izin}
      AND {filter_tahun}
      AND {filter_bulan}
      AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
    GROUP BY UPPER(TRIM(VERIFIKATOR))
),
STATS_LALIN AS (
    SELECT 
        UPPER(TRIM(H.VERIFIKATOR_LOG)) AS NAMA_STAF,
        COUNT(H.NO_PERMOHONAN) AS TOTAL_KERJA,
        SUM(CASE WHEN T.STATUS_TERAKHIR NOT IN ('0203020102', '0203020202') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_LOLOS,
        SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(H.TGL_LOG, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') NOT IN ('SAT', 'SUN') 
              AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(H.TGL_LOG, 'HH24MI')) BETWEEN 800 AND 1630 
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA,
        SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(T.STATUS_PENCAPAIAN_SLA) IN ('SESUAI SLA', 'MEMENUHI SLA') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA
    FROM US_DWH.BI_H_ALL H
    JOIN US_DWH.BI_T_ALL T ON H.NO_PERMOHONAN = T.NO_PERMOHONAN
    WHERE H.VERIFIKATOR_LOG IS NOT NULL
      AND UPPER(T.JENIS_IZIN) NOT IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU', 'PL', 'PPKH', 'PKKPRL')
      AND H.ROLE_ID_LALIN IN ('0203020102', '0203020202')
      AND {pilih_izin}
      AND {filter_tahun}
      AND {filter_bulan}
      AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
    GROUP BY UPPER(TRIM(H.VERIFIKATOR_LOG))
),
GABUNGAN AS (
    SELECT * FROM STATS_PB
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM STATS_LALIN
),
STATS_STAF AS (
    SELECT 
        NAMA_STAF,
        SUM(TOTAL_KERJA) AS TOTAL_KERJA,
        SUM(TOTAL_LOLOS) AS TOTAL_LOLOS,
        SUM(TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA) AS TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA,
        SUM(TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA) AS TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA
    FROM GABUNGAN
    GROUP BY NAMA_STAF
)
SELECT 
    NAMA_STAF AS NAMA_STAF,
    COALESCE(ROUND(
        (0.4 * (TOTAL_LOLOS / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100) + 
        (0.3 * (TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100) + 
        (0.3 * (TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100)
    , 2), 0) AS SKOR_AKHIR,
    COALESCE(ROUND((TOTAL_LOLOS / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100, 2), 0) AS NILAI_PERFORMA,
    COALESCE(ROUND((TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100, 2), 0) AS NILAI_PRODUKTIVITAS,
    COALESCE(ROUND((TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100, 2), 0) AS NILAI_SLA,
    TOTAL_KERJA AS TOTAL_DOKUMEN_KERJA
FROM STATS_STAF
ORDER BY SKOR_AKHIR DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

description: OSS: Sebaran jenis perizinan (stacked bar per jenis izin vs status)
sql_template:
WITH FILTERED_DATA AS (
    SELECT JENIS_IZIN, SUB_JENIS_IZIN, STATUS_TERAKHIR, KATEGORI_STATUS, NO_PERMOHONAN
    FROM US_DWH.BI_T_IZIN_OSS
    WHERE 1=1
      AND {pilih_izin}
      AND {filter_tahun}
      AND {filter_bulan}
      AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
),
MODE_DETECTOR AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT JENIS_IZIN) AS JML_IZIN_AKTIF, MAX(JENIS_IZIN) AS IZIN_TUNGGAL
    FROM FILTERED_DATA
),
GROUPED_DATA AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN M.JML_IZIN_AKTIF = 1 AND M.IZIN_TUNGGAL = 'PL' THEN F.SUB_JENIS_IZIN
            ELSE F.JENIS_IZIN
        END AS SUMBU_X,
        CASE 
            WHEN M.JML_IZIN_AKTIF = 1 THEN F.STATUS_TERAKHIR
            ELSE F.KATEGORI_STATUS
        END AS LABEL_STACK_STATUS,
        COUNT(F.NO_PERMOHONAN) AS JUMLAH_DOKUMEN
    FROM FILTERED_DATA F
    CROSS JOIN MODE_DETECTOR M
    GROUP BY 
        CASE 
            WHEN M.JML_IZIN_AKTIF = 1 AND M.IZIN_TUNGGAL = 'PL' THEN F.SUB_JENIS_IZIN
            ELSE F.JENIS_IZIN
        END,
        CASE 
            WHEN M.JML_IZIN_AKTIF = 1 THEN F.STATUS_TERAKHIR
            ELSE F.KATEGORI_STATUS
        END
)
SELECT 
    SUMBU_X,
    LABEL_STACK_STATUS,
    COALESCE(JUMLAH_DOKUMEN, 0) AS JUMLAH_DOKUMEN
FROM GROUPED_DATA
ORDER BY 
    SUM(JUMLAH_DOKUMEN) OVER(PARTITION BY SUMBU_X) DESC,
    SUMBU_X ASC,
    JUMLAH_DOKUMEN DESC

description: OSS: Sebaran status permohonan (alur/sankey dari total ke jenis izin ke status)
sql_template:
WITH FILTERED_DATA AS (
    SELECT JENIS_IZIN, SUB_JENIS_IZIN, STATUS_TERAKHIR, KATEGORI_STATUS, NO_PERMOHONAN
    FROM US_DWH.BI_T_IZIN_OSS
    WHERE 1=1
      AND {pilih_izin}
      AND {filter_tahun}
      AND {filter_bulan}
      AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
),
MODE_DETECTOR AS (
    SELECT 
        JENIS_IZIN, SUB_JENIS_IZIN, STATUS_TERAKHIR, KATEGORI_STATUS, NO_PERMOHONAN,
        COUNT(DISTINCT JENIS_IZIN) OVER () AS JML_IZIN_AKTIF,
        MAX(CASE WHEN JENIS_IZIN = 'PL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER () AS HAS_PL
    FROM FILTERED_DATA
),
AGGREGATED_DATA AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN JML_IZIN_AKTIF = 1 AND HAS_PL = 1 THEN SUB_JENIS_IZIN
            ELSE JENIS_IZIN
        END AS KATEGORI_IZIN,
        CASE 
            WHEN JML_IZIN_AKTIF = 1 THEN STATUS_TERAKHIR
            ELSE KATEGORI_STATUS
        END AS TARGET_STATUS,
        COUNT(NO_PERMOHONAN) AS JUMLAH
    FROM MODE_DETECTOR
    GROUP BY 
        CASE 
            WHEN JML_IZIN_AKTIF = 1 AND HAS_PL = 1 THEN SUB_JENIS_IZIN
            ELSE JENIS_IZIN
        END,
        CASE 
            WHEN JML_IZIN_AKTIF = 1 THEN STATUS_TERAKHIR
            ELSE KATEGORI_STATUS
        END
),
FINAL_FLOW AS (
    SELECT 
        'TOTAL PERMOHONAN' AS SOURCE, 
        KATEGORI_IZIN AS TARGET, 
        COALESCE(SUM(JUMLAH), 0) AS VALUE,
        1 AS FLOW_LEVEL
    FROM AGGREGATED_DATA 
    GROUP BY KATEGORI_IZIN
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        KATEGORI_IZIN AS SOURCE, 
        TARGET_STATUS AS TARGET, 
        COALESCE(JUMLAH, 0) AS VALUE,
        2 AS FLOW_LEVEL
    FROM AGGREGATED_DATA 
    WHERE JUMLAH > 0
)
SELECT SOURCE, TARGET, VALUE 
FROM FINAL_FLOW
ORDER BY 
    FLOW_LEVEL ASC, 
    VALUE DESC

description: OSS: Tren inflow (permohonan masuk) vs outflow (terbit)
sql_template:
WITH FILTERED_DATA AS (
    SELECT 
        NO_PERMOHONAN, 
        KATEGORI_STATUS, 
        TRUNC(TGL_MASUK) AS TGL_MASUK, 
        TRUNC(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR) AS TGL_SELESAI
    FROM US_DWH.BI_T_IZIN_OSS
    WHERE 1=1
      AND {pilih_izin}
      AND {filter_tahun}
      AND {filter_bulan}
      AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
),
ALL_DATES AS (
    SELECT TGL_MASUK AS TGL FROM FILTERED_DATA WHERE TGL_MASUK IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT TGL_SELESAI AS TGL FROM FILTERED_DATA WHERE TGL_SELESAI IS NOT NULL AND KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TERBIT'
),
INFLOW AS (
    SELECT TGL_MASUK AS TGL, COUNT(NO_PERMOHONAN) AS JML_INFLOW
    FROM FILTERED_DATA
    WHERE TGL_MASUK IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY TGL_MASUK
),
OUTFLOW AS (
    SELECT TGL_SELESAI AS TGL, COUNT(NO_PERMOHONAN) AS JML_OUTFLOW
    FROM FILTERED_DATA
    WHERE KATEGORI_STATUS = 'TERBIT' AND TGL_SELESAI IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY TGL_SELESAI
)
SELECT 
    D.TGL AS TANGGAL,
    COALESCE(I.JML_INFLOW, 0) AS INFLOW_PERMOHONAN,
    COALESCE(O.JML_OUTFLOW, 0) AS OUTFLOW_TERBIT
FROM ALL_DATES D
LEFT JOIN INFLOW I ON D.TGL = I.TGL
LEFT JOIN OUTFLOW O ON D.TGL = O.TGL
ORDER BY D.TGL ASC

description: OSS: Pemetaan titik kemacetan proses per tahapan
sql_template:
WITH DATA_STATUS AS (
    SELECT UPPER(JENIS_IZIN) AS JENIS_IZIN, STATUS_TERAKHIR
    FROM US_DWH.BI_T_IZIN_OSS
    WHERE 1=1
      AND {pilih_izin}
      AND {filter_tahun}
      AND {filter_bulan}
      AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
),
MODE_FUNNEL AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT JENIS_IZIN) = 1 THEN MAX(JENIS_IZIN) ELSE 'UMUM' END AS TIPE_FUNNEL
    FROM DATA_STATUS
),
LEVELING AS (
    SELECT D.*, M.TIPE_FUNNEL,
        CASE 
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL = 'UMUM' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TERBIT%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%DISETUJUI%' THEN 4
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%KEMBALI%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%PEMBAYARAN%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%PERBAIKAN%' THEN 3
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%VERIFIKASI%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%RAPAT%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%STAF%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%KASIE%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%DIREKTUR%' THEN 2
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%PENOLAKAN%' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL IN ('PB', 'PBUMKU') THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TERBIT%' THEN 6
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%VERIFIKASI%' THEN 5
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%SURVEI%' THEN 4
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%PERSETUJUAN%' THEN 3
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%KOMITMEN%' THEN 2
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%KEMBALI%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TOLAK%' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL = 'PL' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TERBIT%' THEN 4
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%RAPAT%' THEN 3
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TEKNIS%' THEN 2
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TOLAK%' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL = 'PKKPRL' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TERBIT%' THEN 7
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%PERSETUJUAN%' THEN 6
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%RAPAT%' THEN 5
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%VERIFIKASI TEKNIS%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TEKNIS%' THEN 4
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%VERIFIKASI DOKUMEN%' THEN 3
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%SPP%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%BAYAR%' THEN 2
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%PENOLAKAN%' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
            WHEN M.TIPE_FUNNEL = 'PPKH' THEN
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TERBIT%' THEN 5
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%DIREKTUR%' THEN 4
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%KASIE%' THEN 3
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%STAF%' THEN 2
                    WHEN UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%TOLAK%' OR UPPER(STATUS_TERAKHIR) LIKE '%PENOLAKAN%' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END
        END AS LVL
    FROM DATA_STATUS D
    CROSS JOIN MODE_FUNNEL M
),
CUMULATIVE AS (
    SELECT 1 AS LVL_ID, COUNT(*) AS JUMLAH FROM LEVELING UNION ALL
    SELECT 2, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 2 UNION ALL
    SELECT 3, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 3 UNION ALL
    SELECT 4, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 4 UNION ALL
    SELECT 5, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 5 UNION ALL
    SELECT 6, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 6 UNION ALL
    SELECT 7, COUNT(*) FROM LEVELING WHERE LVL >= 7
),
LABELS AS (
    SELECT 'UMUM' AS TIPE, 1 AS LVL_ID, '1. Dokumen Masuk' AS LABEL FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'UMUM', 2, '2. Dalam Proses' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'UMUM', 3, '3. Proses Pelaku Usaha' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'UMUM', 4, '4. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 1, '1. Permohonan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 2, '2. Pemenuhan Komitmen' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 3, '3. Persetujuan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 4, '4. Survei' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 5, '5. Verifikasi' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PB', 6, '6. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 1, '1. Permohonan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 2, '2. Pemenuhan Komitmen' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 3, '3. Persetujuan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 4, '4. Survei' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 5, '5. Verifikasi' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PBUMKU', 6, '6. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PL', 1, '1. Permohonan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PL', 2, '2. Verifikasi Teknis' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PL', 3, '3. Rapat Pimpinan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PL', 4, '4. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 1, '1. Permohonan Masuk' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 2, '2. Pelunasan SPP' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 3, '3. Verifikasi Dokumen' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 4, '4. Verifikasi Teknis' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 5, '5. Rapat Pimpinan' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 6, '6. Persetujuan KKPRL' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PKKPRL', 7, '7. Terbit' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PPKH', 1, '1. Permohonan Masuk' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PPKH', 2, '2. Staf Pemroses' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PPKH', 3, '3. Kasie Pemroses' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PPKH', 4, '4. Direktur PPKH' FROM DUAL UNION ALL
    SELECT 'PPKH', 5, '5. Terbit' FROM DUAL
)
SELECT L.LABEL AS TAHAPAN, COALESCE(C.JUMLAH, 0) AS JUMLAH 
FROM CUMULATIVE C
CROSS JOIN MODE_FUNNEL M
JOIN LABELS L ON C.LVL_ID = L.LVL_ID AND L.TIPE = M.TIPE_FUNNEL
WHERE L.LABEL IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY L.LVL_ID

description: OSS: Leaderboard kepatuhan SLA per verifikator
sql_template:
SELECT 
    NVL(VERIFIKATOR, 'TOTAL KESELURUHAN') AS NAMA,
    NVL(JABATAN_VERIFIKATOR, '-') AS JABATAN, 
    NVL(UPPER(JENIS_IZIN), '-') AS JENIS_IZIN,
    COALESCE(COUNT(NO_PERMOHONAN), 0) AS TOTAL_DOKUMEN,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'DALAM PROSES' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS TOTAL_DOKUMEN_AKTIF,
    COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(HARI_SLA_TERPAKAI), 1), 0) AS RATA_RATA_HARI_PROSES,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN HARI_SLA_TERPAKAI <= BATAS_SLA_HARI THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS JUMLAH_SESUAI_SLA,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS = 'DALAM PROSES' AND HARI_SLA_TERPAKAI > BATAS_SLA_HARI THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS JUMLAH_LEWAT_SLA
FROM US_DWH.BI_T_IZIN_OSS
WHERE VERIFIKATOR IS NOT NULL
  AND {pilih_izin}
  AND {filter_tahun}
  AND {filter_bulan}
  AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
GROUP BY ROLLUP((VERIFIKATOR, JABATAN_VERIFIKATOR, UPPER(JENIS_IZIN)))
ORDER BY 
    CASE WHEN VERIFIKATOR IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC,
    JUMLAH_LEWAT_SLA DESC, 
    TOTAL_DOKUMEN_AKTIF DESC, 
    NAMA ASC

params.rentang_tgl_masuk: Filter rentang tanggal masuk (contoh: TGL_MASUK >= TO_DATE('2025-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD'))

insight_template.insight: Perbandingan kepatuhan SLA antar verifikator menunjukkan variasi kinerja.
insight_template.rekomendasi: Berikan pelatihan pada verifikator dengan tingkat pelanggaran SLA tertinggi.

description: OSS: Rapor kinerja verifikator (skor akhir, performa, produktivitas, SLA)
sql_template:
WITH STATS_STAF AS (
    SELECT 
        UPPER(TRIM(VERIFIKATOR)) AS NAMA_STAF,
        COUNT(NO_PERMOHONAN) AS TOTAL_KERJA,
        SUM(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_STATUS <> 'DALAM PROSES' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_LOLOS,
        SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'HH24') = '00' OR TO_CHAR(TGL_STATUS_TERAKHIR, 'HH24MI') BETWEEN '0800' AND '1630' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA,
        SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS_PENCAPAIAN_SLA = 'SESUAI SLA' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA
    FROM US_DWH.BI_T_IZIN_OSS
    WHERE VERIFIKATOR IS NOT NULL
      AND (UPPER(JABATAN_VERIFIKATOR) LIKE '%VERIFIKATOR%' OR UPPER(JABATAN_VERIFIKATOR) LIKE '%STAF%')
      AND {pilih_izin}
      AND {filter_tahun}
      AND {filter_bulan}
      AND {rentang_tgl_masuk}
    GROUP BY UPPER(TRIM(VERIFIKATOR))
)
SELECT 
    NAMA_STAF AS NAMA_STAF,
    COALESCE(ROUND(
        (0.4 * (TOTAL_LOLOS / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100) + 
        (0.3 * (TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100) + 
        (0.3 * (TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100)
    , 2), 0) AS SKOR_AKHIR,
    COALESCE(ROUND((TOTAL_LOLOS / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100, 2), 0) AS NILAI_PERFORMA,
    COALESCE(ROUND((TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100, 2), 0) AS NILAI_PRODUKTIVITAS,
    COALESCE(ROUND((TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100, 2), 0) AS NILAI_SLA,
    TOTAL_KERJA AS TOTAL_DOKUMEN_KERJA
FROM STATS_STAF
ORDER BY SKOR_AKHIR DESC

params.rentang_tgl_masuk: Filter rentang tanggal masuk (contoh: TGL_MASUK >= TO_DATE('2025-01-01','YYYY-MM-DD'))

description: iBOSS: Total dokumen melewati SLA (overdue real-time)
sql_template:
SELECT 
    COUNT(TX_PERMOHONAN.SEQREQ) AS DOKUMEN_MELEWATI_SLA
FROM US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN
LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = R.KD_ROLE
WHERE TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUSINVOICE = 1
  AND TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN NOT IN ('02030188', '02030199', '02030190')
  AND (
      SYSDATE - 
      CASE 
          WHEN (CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE))) > (16.5 / 24) 
               THEN TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)) + 1 + (8 / 24)
          WHEN (CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE))) < (8 / 24) 
               THEN TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)) + (8 / 24)
          ELSE CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)
      END
  ) * 24 > 24
  AND {rentang_waktu}
  AND {pilih_tahun}
  AND {pilih_bulan}
  AND {pilih_role}
  AND {pilih_izin_iboss}

description: iBOSS: Sebaran izin berdasarkan status (per kategori izin besar atau sub jenis)
sql_template:
WITH BASE_DATA AS (
    SELECT 
        TX_PERMOHONAN.SEQREQ,
        TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN,
        CASE 
            WHEN LYN.IDLAYAN LIKE '018%' OR LYN.IDLAYAN IN ('012135') THEN 'Izin Usaha Kawasan'
            WHEN LYN.IDLAYAN LIKE '004%' OR LYN.IDLAYAN LIKE '005%' OR LYN.IDLAYAN LIKE '006%' OR LYN.IDLAYAN LIKE '007%' OR LYN.IDLAYAN LIKE '008%' OR LYN.IDLAYAN LIKE '009%' OR LYN.IDLAYAN LIKE '021%' THEN 'Izin Operasional Komersial'
            WHEN LYN.IDLAYAN IN ('012048', '009001', '01299', '011010', '012022') THEN 'Perizinan Pendukung'
            ELSE 'Lainnya'
        END AS KATEGORI_IZIN_BESAR,
        LYN.URAILAYAN AS SUB_JENIS_IZIN
    FROM US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = R.KD_ROLE
    WHERE TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUSINVOICE = 1
      AND {rentang_waktu}
      AND {pilih_tahun}
      AND {pilih_bulan}
      AND {pilih_role}
      AND {pilih_izin_iboss}
),
DETEKSI_MODE AS (
    SELECT 
        SEQREQ, STATUS_IZIN, KATEGORI_IZIN_BESAR, SUB_JENIS_IZIN,
        MAX(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_IZIN_BESAR = 'Izin Usaha Kawasan' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER () AS HAS_IUK,
        MAX(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_IZIN_BESAR = 'Izin Operasional Komersial' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER () AS HAS_IOK,
        MAX(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_IZIN_BESAR = 'Perizinan Pendukung' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER () AS HAS_PP,
        MAX(CASE WHEN KATEGORI_IZIN_BESAR = 'Lainnya' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER () AS HAS_LAIN
    FROM BASE_DATA
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN (HAS_IUK + HAS_IOK + HAS_PP + HAS_LAIN) = 1 THEN SUB_JENIS_IZIN
        ELSE KATEGORI_IZIN_BESAR
    END AS TAMPILAN_IZIN,
    COUNT(SEQREQ) AS TOTAL_PERMOHONAN,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '02030188' THEN 1 END) AS TOTAL_TERBIT,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '02030199' THEN 1 END) AS TOTAL_TOLAK,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '02030190' THEN 1 END) AS TOTAL_CABUT,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN STATUS_IZIN NOT IN ('02030188', '02030199', '02030190') THEN 1 END) AS TOTAL_PROSES
FROM DETEKSI_MODE
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN (HAS_IUK + HAS_IOK + HAS_PP + HAS_LAIN) = 1 THEN SUB_JENIS_IZIN
        ELSE KATEGORI_IZIN_BESAR
    END
ORDER BY TAMPILAN_IZIN ASC

description: iBOSS: Sebaran perizinan dalam proses (flow/sankey per role)
sql_template:
WITH DATA_PROSES AS (
    SELECT 
        TX_PERMOHONAN.SEQREQ, 
        TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN, 
        R.KD_ROLE, 
        R.URAIAN_ROLE
    FROM US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = R.KD_ROLE
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
    WHERE TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUSINVOICE = 1
      AND TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN NOT IN ('02030188','02030199','02030190')
      AND {rentang_waktu}
      AND {pilih_tahun}
      AND {pilih_bulan}
      AND {pilih_role}
      AND {pilih_izin_iboss}
)
SELECT 
    'Dokumen Dalam Proses' AS SOURCE,
    CASE 
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203020102','0203020202') THEN 'Staf Lalu Lintas Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203020101','0203020201') THEN 'Kepala Seksi Lalu Lintas Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203011203','0203010203','0203020001') THEN 'Kepala Subdit Perizinan'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '02030100' THEN 'Direktur Lalu Lintas Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('02030101', '2100100') THEN 'Direktur PTSP'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '02030301' OR UPPER(URAIAN_ROLE) LIKE '%PENERBITAN%' THEN 'Staf Penerbitan PTSP'
        ELSE 'Antrean Lain / Eksternal'
    END AS TARGET,
    COUNT(SEQREQ) AS VALUE
FROM DATA_PROSES
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203020102','0203020202') THEN 'Staf Lalu Lintas Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203020101','0203020201') THEN 'Kepala Seksi Lalu Lintas Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203011203','0203010203','0203020001') THEN 'Kepala Subdit Perizinan'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '02030100' THEN 'Direktur Lalu Lintas Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('02030101', '2100100') THEN 'Direktur PTSP'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '02030301' OR UPPER(URAIAN_ROLE) LIKE '%PENERBITAN%' THEN 'Staf Penerbitan PTSP'
        ELSE 'Antrean Lain / Eksternal'
    END
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203020102','0203020202') THEN 'Staf Lalu Lintas Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203020101','0203020201') THEN 'Kepala Seksi Lalu Lintas Barang'
    END AS SOURCE,
    CASE 
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '0203020102' THEN 'Staf Seksi Pemasukan Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '0203020202' THEN 'Staf Seksi Pengeluaran Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '0203020101' THEN 'Kepala Seksi Pemasukan Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '0203020201' THEN 'Kepala Seksi Pengeluaran Barang'
    END AS TARGET,
    COUNT(SEQREQ) AS VALUE
FROM DATA_PROSES
WHERE STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203020102','0203020202','0203020101','0203020201')
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203020102','0203020202') THEN 'Staf Lalu Lintas Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203020101','0203020201') THEN 'Kepala Seksi Lalu Lintas Barang'
    END,
    CASE 
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '0203020102' THEN 'Staf Seksi Pemasukan Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '0203020202' THEN 'Staf Seksi Pengeluaran Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '0203020101' THEN 'Kepala Seksi Pemasukan Barang'
        WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '0203020201' THEN 'Kepala Seksi Pengeluaran Barang'
    END

description: iBOSS: Tren inflow (masuk) vs outflow (terbit) per hari
sql_template:
WITH TREN_DATA AS (
    SELECT 
        TRUNC(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGL_DAFTAR) AS TANGGAL,
        1 AS MASUK, 
        0 AS TERBIT
    FROM US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = R.KD_ROLE
    WHERE TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUSINVOICE = 1
      AND {rentang_waktu}
      AND {pilih_tahun}
      AND {pilih_bulan}
      AND {pilih_role}
      AND {pilih_izin_iboss}
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        TRUNC(TX_PERMOHONAN.LAST_PROSES) AS TANGGAL,
        0 AS MASUK, 
        1 AS TERBIT
    FROM US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = R.KD_ROLE
    WHERE TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUSINVOICE = 1 
      AND TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = '02030188'
      AND {rentang_waktu}
      AND {pilih_tahun}
      AND {pilih_bulan}
      AND {pilih_role}
      AND {pilih_izin_iboss}
)
SELECT 
    TANGGAL,
    SUM(MASUK) AS INFLOW_MASUK,
    SUM(TERBIT) AS OUTFLOW_TERBIT
FROM TREN_DATA
WHERE TANGGAL IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY TANGGAL
ORDER BY TANGGAL ASC

description: iBOSS: Analisis bottleneck per tahapan proses (funnel)
sql_template:
WITH DOC_BASE AS (
    SELECT 
        TX_PERMOHONAN.SEQREQ, 
        TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN,
        CASE 
            WHEN 1=0 OR LOWER({pilih_seksi}) LIKE '%pemasukan%' THEN 'PEMASUKAN'
            WHEN 1=0 OR LOWER({pilih_seksi}) LIKE '%pengeluaran%' THEN 'PENGELUARAN'
            ELSE 'UMUM'
        END AS MODE_SEKSI
    FROM US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = R.KD_ROLE
    WHERE TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUSINVOICE = 1
      AND {rentang_waktu}
      AND {pilih_tahun}
      AND {pilih_bulan}
      AND {pilih_role}
      AND {pilih_izin_iboss}
),
LOG_FLAGS AS (
    SELECT 
        L.ID_IZIN,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '0203020102' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS STAF_MASUK,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '0203020202' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS STAF_KELUAR,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203020102', '0203020202', '02030301') OR UPPER(TR.URAIAN_ROLE) LIKE '%STAF%' OR UPPER(TR.URAIAN_ROLE) LIKE '%VERIFIKATOR%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS STAF_ANY,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '0203020101' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS KASI_MASUK,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '0203020201' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS KASI_KELUAR,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203020101', '0203020201') OR UPPER(TR.URAIAN_ROLE) LIKE '%KASI%' OR UPPER(TR.URAIAN_ROLE) LIKE '%KEPALA SEKSI%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS KASI_ANY,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203011203','0203010203','0203020001') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLAG_KASUBDIT,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '02030100' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLAG_DIR_LALIN,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('02030101', '2100100') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLAG_DIR_PTSP
    FROM US_OSS.T_LOG_LICENSING L
    JOIN US_OSS.TX_USERS U ON L.USER_ID = U.USER_ID
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE TR ON U.ROLE_ID = TR.KD_ROLE
    JOIN DOC_BASE B ON L.ID_IZIN = TO_CHAR(B.SEQREQ)
    GROUP BY L.ID_IZIN
),
MASTER_DATA AS (
    SELECT B.SEQREQ, B.STATUS_IZIN, B.MODE_SEKSI, L.*
    FROM DOC_BASE B
    LEFT JOIN LOG_FLAGS L ON TO_CHAR(B.SEQREQ) = L.ID_IZIN
    WHERE (B.MODE_SEKSI = 'UMUM') 
       OR (B.MODE_SEKSI = 'PEMASUKAN' AND L.STAF_MASUK = 1) 
       OR (B.MODE_SEKSI = 'PENGELUARAN' AND L.STAF_KELUAR = 1)
),
RESULTS AS (
    SELECT '1. Dokumen Masuk' AS TAHAPAN_PROSES, 1 AS URUTAN, COUNT(SEQREQ) AS JUMLAH_DOKUMEN FROM MASTER_DATA
    UNION ALL
    SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(MODE_SEKSI) = 'PEMASUKAN' THEN '2. Staf Seksi Pemasukan Barang' WHEN MAX(MODE_SEKSI) = 'PENGELUARAN' THEN '2. Staf Seksi Pengeluaran Barang' ELSE '2. Staf / Verifikator' END, 2, SUM(STAF_ANY) FROM MASTER_DATA
    UNION ALL
    SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(MODE_SEKSI) = 'PEMASUKAN' THEN '3. Kepala Seksi Pemasukan Barang' WHEN MAX(MODE_SEKSI) = 'PENGELUARAN' THEN '3. Kepala Seksi Pengeluaran Barang' ELSE '3. Kepala Seksi' END, 3, SUM(KASI_ANY) FROM MASTER_DATA
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '4. Kasubdit Perizinan', 4, SUM(FLAG_KASUBDIT) FROM MASTER_DATA
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '5. Direktur Lalu Lintas Barang', 5, SUM(FLAG_DIR_LALIN) FROM MASTER_DATA
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '6. Direktur PTSP', 6, SUM(FLAG_DIR_PTSP) FROM MASTER_DATA
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '7. Izin Terbit', 7, SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS_IZIN = '02030188' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM MASTER_DATA
)
SELECT TAHAPAN_PROSES, JUMLAH_DOKUMEN 
FROM RESULTS 
ORDER BY URUTAN ASC

insight_template.insight: Funnel menunjukkan [TOTAL] dokumen yang mengalir antar tahapan dengan potensi kemacetan.

description: iBOSS: Rata-rata waktu penyelesaian per role/jabatan
sql_template:
WITH RAW_DATA AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '0203020102' THEN 'Staf Seksi Pemasukan Barang'
            WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '0203020202' THEN 'Staf Seksi Pengeluaran Barang'
            WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '0203020101' THEN 'Kepala Seksi Pemasukan Barang'
            WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '0203020201' THEN 'Kepala Seksi Pengeluaran Barang'
            WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203011203','0203010203','0203020001') THEN 'Kepala Subdit Perizinan'
            WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '02030100' THEN 'Direktur Lalu Lintas Barang'
            WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('02030101', '2100100') THEN 'Direktur PTSP'
            WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '02030301' OR UPPER(R.URAIAN_ROLE) LIKE '%PENERBITAN%' THEN 'Staf Penerbitan PTSP'
        END AS JABATAN,
        T_LOG_LICENSING.DIFFERENCE_TIME
    FROM US_OSS.T_LOG_LICENSING
    JOIN US_OSS.TX_USERS U ON T_LOG_LICENSING.USER_ID = U.USER_ID
    JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON U.ROLE_ID = R.KD_ROLE
    JOIN US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN ON T_LOG_LICENSING.ID_IZIN = TO_CHAR(TX_PERMOHONAN.SEQREQ)
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
    WHERE T_LOG_LICENSING.USER_ID != 0 
      AND T_LOG_LICENSING.DIFFERENCE_TIME IS NOT NULL
      AND (U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203020102','0203020202','0203020101','0203020201','0203011203','0203010203','0203020001','02030100','02030101','2100100','02030301') OR UPPER(R.URAIAN_ROLE) LIKE '%PENERBITAN%')
      AND {rentang_waktu}
      AND {pilih_tahun}
      AND {pilih_bulan}
      AND {pilih_izin_iboss}
)
SELECT 
    JABATAN,
    ROUND(AVG(DIFFERENCE_TIME) / 60, 2) AS RATA_WAKTU_MENIT
FROM RAW_DATA
WHERE JABATAN IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY JABATAN
ORDER BY AVG(DIFFERENCE_TIME) DESC

description: iBOSS: Kepatuhan SLA permohonan (gauge)
sql_template:
SELECT 
    SUM(
        CASE 
            WHEN (
                CASE 
                    WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN IN ('02030188', '02030199', '02030190') THEN CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.LAST_PROSES AS DATE)
                    ELSE SYSDATE
                END
                - 
                CASE 
                    WHEN (CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE))) > (16.5 / 24) 
                         THEN TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)) + 1 + (8 / 24)
                    WHEN (CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE))) < (8 / 24) 
                         THEN TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)) + (8 / 24)
                    ELSE CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)
                END
            ) * 24 <= 24 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END
    ) / NULLIF(COUNT(TX_PERMOHONAN.SEQREQ), 0) AS GAUGE_KEPATUHAN_SLA
FROM US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN
LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = R.KD_ROLE
WHERE TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUSINVOICE = 1
  AND {rentang_waktu}
  AND {pilih_tahun}
  AND {pilih_bulan}
  AND {pilih_role}
  AND {pilih_izin_iboss}

insight_template.insight: Capaian [GAUGE_KEPATUHAN_SLA] menggambarkan tingkat kepatuhan layanan iBOSS terhadap SLA 24 jam.
insight_template.rekomendasi: Identifikasi dokumen yang melewati SLA untuk tindak lanjut prioritas.

description: iBOSS: Leaderboard kepatuhan SLA per posisi dokumen
sql_template:
WITH RAW_DATA AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN IN ('00000000', '02030301') THEN 'Staf Penerbitan PTSP'
            WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = '0203020102' THEN 'Staf Seksi Pemasukan Barang'
            WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = '0203020202' THEN 'Staf Seksi Pengeluaran Barang'
            WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = '0203020101' THEN 'Kepala Seksi Pemasukan Barang'
            WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = '0203020201' THEN 'Kepala Seksi Pengeluaran Barang'
            WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN IN ('0203011203','0203010203','0203020001') THEN 'Kepala Subdit Perizinan'
            WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = '02030100' THEN 'Direktur Lalu Lintas Barang'
            WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN IN ('02030101', '2100100') THEN 'Direktur PTSP'
            WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN IN ('02030188', '02030199', '02030190') THEN 'Selesai (Terbit/Tolak/Cabut)'
            ELSE NVL(R.URAIAN_ROLE, 'Lainnya (Kode: ' || TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN || ')')
        END AS POSISI_DOKUMEN,
        (CASE 
            WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN IN ('02030188', '02030199', '02030190') THEN CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.LAST_PROSES AS DATE)
            ELSE SYSDATE
        END)
        - 
        (CASE 
            WHEN (CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE))) > (16.5 / 24) 
                 THEN TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)) + 1 + (8 / 24)
            WHEN (CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE))) < (8 / 24) 
                 THEN TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)) + (8 / 24)
            ELSE CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)
        END) AS UMUR_DOKUMEN
    FROM US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = R.KD_ROLE
    WHERE TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUSINVOICE = 1 
      AND {rentang_waktu}
      AND {pilih_tahun}
      AND {pilih_bulan}
      AND {pilih_role}
      AND {pilih_izin_iboss}
)
SELECT 
    NVL(POSISI_DOKUMEN, 'TOTAL KESELURUHAN') AS POSISI_DOKUMEN,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_DOKUMEN,
    SUM(CASE WHEN UMUR_DOKUMEN * 24 <= 24 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOK_MEMENUHI_SLA,
    SUM(CASE WHEN UMUR_DOKUMEN * 24 > 24 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DOK_MELEWATI_SLA
FROM RAW_DATA
GROUP BY ROLLUP(POSISI_DOKUMEN)
ORDER BY 
    CASE WHEN POSISI_DOKUMEN IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC,
    DOK_MELEWATI_SLA DESC, 
    TOTAL_DOKUMEN DESC
llm_label: Leaderboard kepatuhan SLA per posisi iBOSS

description: iBOSS: Rapor evaluasi staf verifikator (skor akhir, performa, produktivitas, SLA)
sql_template:
WITH DOC_SLA AS (
    SELECT ID_IZIN, SUM(DIFFERENCE_TIME) AS TOTAL_WAKTU_DETIK
    FROM US_OSS.T_LOG_LICENSING
    WHERE DIFFERENCE_TIME IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY ID_IZIN
),
STAFF_LOGS AS (
    SELECT 
        U.NAME,
        L.LOG_ID,
        TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN,
        CASE 
            WHEN TO_CHAR(L.ACTION_TIME, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') NOT IN ('SAT', 'SUN') 
            AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(L.ACTION_TIME, 'HH24MI')) BETWEEN 800 AND 1630 
            THEN 1 ELSE 0 
        END AS IS_JAM_KERJA,
        CASE 
            WHEN (
                CAST(NVL(TX_PERMOHONAN.LAST_PROSES, SYSDATE) AS DATE)
                -
                (CASE 
                    WHEN (CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE))) > (16.5 / 24) 
                         THEN TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)) + 1 + (8 / 24)
                    WHEN (CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE))) < (8 / 24) 
                         THEN TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)) + (8 / 24)
                    ELSE CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)
                END)
            ) * 24 <= 24 THEN 1 
            WHEN D.TOTAL_WAKTU_DETIK <= 86400 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS IS_MEMENUHI_SLA
    FROM US_OSS.T_LOG_LICENSING L
    JOIN US_OSS.TX_USERS U ON L.USER_ID = U.USER_ID
    JOIN US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN ON L.ID_IZIN = TO_CHAR(TX_PERMOHONAN.SEQREQ)
    LEFT JOIN DOC_SLA D ON L.ID_IZIN = D.ID_IZIN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
    LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = R.KD_ROLE
    WHERE L.USER_ID != 0 AND L.DIFFERENCE_TIME IS NOT NULL
      AND U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203020102','0203020202')
      AND TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUSINVOICE = 1
      AND {rentang_waktu}
      AND {pilih_tahun}
      AND {pilih_bulan}
      AND {pilih_role}
      AND {pilih_izin_iboss}
),
STAFF_AGGR AS (
    SELECT 
        NAME,
        COUNT(LOG_ID) AS TOTAL_KERJA,
        SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS_IZIN NOT IN ('0203020102','0203020202') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_LOLOS,
        SUM(IS_JAM_KERJA) AS TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA,
        SUM(IS_MEMENUHI_SLA) AS TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA
    FROM STAFF_LOGS
    GROUP BY NAME
)
SELECT 
    NAME AS NAMA_STAF,
    ROUND(
        (0.4 * (TOTAL_LOLOS / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100) + 
        (0.3 * (TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100) + 
        (0.3 * (TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100)
    , 2) AS SKOR_AKHIR,
    ROUND((TOTAL_LOLOS / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100, 2) AS NILAI_PERFORMA,
    ROUND((TOTAL_DALAM_JAM_KERJA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100, 2) AS NILAI_PRODUKTIVITAS,
    ROUND((TOTAL_MEMENUHI_SLA / NULLIF(TOTAL_KERJA, 0)) * 100, 2) AS NILAI_SLA
FROM STAFF_AGGR
ORDER BY SKOR_AKHIR DESC

insight_template.insight: Skor akhir staf berkisar dengan rata-rata yang menunjukkan variasi kinerja.
insight_template.rekomendasi: Gunakan data ini untuk program peningkatan kapasitas staf.

description: iBOSS: Detail permohonan lengkap dengan histori proses per role
sql_template:
WITH DOC_LOGS AS (
    SELECT 
        L.ID_IZIN,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203020102','0203020202') THEN L.ACTION_TIME END) AS TGL_STAFF,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203020102','0203020202') THEN U.NAME END) AS USER_STAFF,
        SUM(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203020102','0203020202') THEN L.DIFFERENCE_TIME ELSE 0 END) AS WAKTU_STAFF_DETIK,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203020101','0203020201') THEN L.ACTION_TIME END) AS TGL_VER_1,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203020101','0203020201') THEN U.NAME END) AS USER_VER_1,
        SUM(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203020101','0203020201') THEN L.DIFFERENCE_TIME ELSE 0 END) AS WAKTU_VER_1_DETIK,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203011203','0203010203','0203020001') THEN L.ACTION_TIME END) AS TGL_VER_2,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203011203','0203010203','0203020001') THEN U.NAME END) AS USER_VER_2,
        SUM(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('0203011203','0203010203','0203020001') THEN L.DIFFERENCE_TIME ELSE 0 END) AS WAKTU_VER_2_DETIK,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '02030100' THEN L.ACTION_TIME END) AS TGL_DIRLALIN,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '02030100' THEN U.NAME END) AS USER_DIRLALIN,
        SUM(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID = '02030100' THEN L.DIFFERENCE_TIME ELSE 0 END) AS WAKTU_DIRLALIN_DETIK,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('02030101', '2100100') THEN L.ACTION_TIME END) AS TGL_PTSP,
        MAX(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('02030101', '2100100') THEN U.NAME END) AS USER_PTSP,
        SUM(CASE WHEN U.ROLE_ID IN ('02030101', '2100100') THEN L.DIFFERENCE_TIME ELSE 0 END) AS WAKTU_PTSP_DETIK,
        SUM(L.DIFFERENCE_TIME) AS TOTAL_WAKTU_DETIK
    FROM US_OSS.T_LOG_LICENSING L
    JOIN US_OSS.TX_USERS U ON L.USER_ID = U.USER_ID
    WHERE L.USER_ID != 0 AND L.DIFFERENCE_TIME IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY L.ID_IZIN
)
SELECT 
    TX_PERMOHONAN.SEQREQ AS NO_DAFTAR,
    COALESCE(LYN.URAILAYAN, TX_PERMOHONAN.URAILAYAN) AS NAMA_LAYANAN,
    TX_PERMOHONAN.NAMA_PERSH AS NAMA_PERUSAHAAN,
    TX_PERMOHONAN.NO_IJIN AS NO_IZIN,
    CASE 
        WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = '02030188' THEN 'Terbit'
        WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = '02030199' THEN 'Ditolak'
        WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = '02030190' THEN 'Dicabut'
        ELSE 'Dalam Proses'
    END AS STATUS_IZIN,
    TX_PERMOHONAN.TGL_DAFTAR AS TGL_MOHON,
    TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS TGL_BAYAR,
    CASE 
        WHEN TO_CHAR(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR, 'DY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') NOT IN ('SAT', 'SUN') 
        AND TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR, 'HH24MI')) BETWEEN 800 AND 1630 
        THEN 'Dalam Jam Kerja' 
        ELSE 'Di Luar Jam Kerja' 
    END AS STATUS_WAKTU_BAYAR,
    DL.TGL_STAFF AS TGL_PROSES_STAF,
    DL.USER_STAFF AS USER_PEMROSES_STAF,
    ROUND(DL.WAKTU_STAFF_DETIK / 3600, 2) AS NILAI_STAFF_JAM,
    DL.TGL_VER_1 AS TGL_VER_I,
    DL.USER_VER_1 AS USER_VER_I,
    ROUND(DL.WAKTU_VER_1_DETIK / 3600, 2) AS NILAI_VER_1_JAM,
    DL.TGL_VER_2 AS TGL_VER_II,
    DL.USER_VER_2 AS USER_VER_II,
    ROUND(DL.WAKTU_VER_2_DETIK / 3600, 2) AS NILAI_VER_2_JAM,
    DL.TGL_DIRLALIN AS TGL_VALIDASI_DIRLALIN,
    DL.USER_DIRLALIN AS USER_DIRLALIN,
    ROUND(DL.WAKTU_DIRLALIN_DETIK / 3600, 2) AS NILAI_DIRLALIN_JAM,
    DL.TGL_PTSP AS TGL_APPROVE_PTSP,
    DL.USER_PTSP AS USER_PTSP,
    ROUND(DL.WAKTU_PTSP_DETIK / 3600, 2) AS NILAI_PTSP_JAM,
    CASE 
        WHEN (
            CASE 
                WHEN TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN IN ('02030188', '02030199', '02030190') THEN CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.LAST_PROSES AS DATE)
                ELSE SYSDATE
            END
            -
            CASE 
                WHEN (CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE))) > (16.5 / 24) 
                     THEN TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)) + 1 + (8 / 24)
                WHEN (CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE) - TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE))) < (8 / 24) 
                     THEN TRUNC(CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)) + (8 / 24)
                ELSE CAST(TX_PERMOHONAN.TGLBAYAR AS DATE)
            END
        ) * 24 <= 24 THEN 'Memenuhi SLA'
        ELSE 'Melewati SLA'
    END AS STATUS_KEPATUHAN_SLA
FROM US_OSS.TX_PERMOHONAN
LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_LAYAN LYN ON TX_PERMOHONAN.IDLAYAN = LYN.IDLAYAN
LEFT JOIN US_OSS.TM_ROLE R ON TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUS_IZIN = R.KD_ROLE
LEFT JOIN DOC_LOGS DL ON TO_CHAR(TX_PERMOHONAN.SEQREQ) = DL.ID_IZIN
WHERE TX_PERMOHONAN.STATUSINVOICE = 1
  AND {rentang_waktu}
  AND {pilih_tahun}
  AND {pilih_bulan}
  AND {pilih_role}
  AND {pilih_izin_iboss}
